# Instructions Standards

## Purpose

Keep repository-wide instructions modular, versioned, and easy to review.

## Standards

1. One concern per file (coding, testing, security, API, etc.).
2. Use explicit, testable rules ("Do X before Y"), not vague advice.
3. Keep instructions short and actionable.
4. Prefer updating existing standards over adding overlapping files.
5. Reference these files from `copilot-instructions.md`.
